case_title: CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO A MUNICIPAL VS DURANT, ERNEST J. DBA PRINTKING

docket_entries.description: PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT DURANT, ERNEST J. DBA PRINTKING
